steps.title: Analyze the structure
steps.content: Both halves of the sentence are independent clauses. The second clause explains the first by elaborating on how light intensity affects photosynthesis.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
A colon properly joins an independent clause to an explanation that follows. A comma alone (B) creates a comma splice, no punctuation (C) is a run-on, and 'and' (D) doesn't fit the explanatory relationship.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
